---
title: "Agentic AI Development"
description: "Evaluation and Monitoring with Langchain Ecosystem | Mehmet Ali Özer | Marmara Üniversitesi 29/4/2026"
resources:
  - slides/
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.column-screen style="margin-left: 10px; margin-right: 10px;"}
<iframe src="slides/index.html" width="100%" height="900px" style="border: 1px solid #eee; border-radius: 8px; background: white;"></iframe>
:::

---

safenlp.org | AI Safety İstanbul
